channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 24 Jun: Harare overcast · high 22° / low 9°
item.description: Harare: high 22°, low 9° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 22°, low 9° (overcast) · Mutare: high 21°, low 9° (overcast) · Gweru: high 22°, low 9° (overcast) · Masvingo: high 22°, low 9° (overcast) · Victoria Falls: high 26°, low 11° (overcast) Tsumo yezuva: Chidamoyo hamba yakada makwati. (People are free to choose what they want.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
